system.flavor: With a flash, you summon whirling death.
system.effect:
Summon a razor top in range.

[Razor Top — Summon (2)]
Summon effect top is dangerous terrain as well as a summon.
Summon effect top can be targeted by effects that push, pull, or teleport a character. Once a round, after you push, pull, or teleport a top, it spins and deals 2 damage to all adjacent foes.
Isolate gains piercing, or becomes 1d3+2 piercing if there are no characters other than you in range 1-2.

(Isolate increased effects if there are no characters other than you adjacent.)
